criteria.name: AI Music Generation
criteria.description: The app's ability to generate original music compositions using artificial intelligence algorithms.

criteria.name: Customization Options
criteria.description: The extent to which users can customize generated music, including genres, styles, and instruments.

criteria.name: User Interface
criteria.description: The app's ease of use and intuitiveness of design.

criteria.name: Licensing and Copyright
criteria.description: The app's terms regarding ownership and commercial use of generated music.

criteria.name: Vocal Integration
criteria.description: The ability to add and manipulate AI-generated vocals in music compositions.

criteria.name: Stem Separation
criteria.description: The capability to separate audio tracks into individual instrument stems.

criteria.name: Pricing Model
criteria.description: The app's subscription fees and available free options.
